name: @memcode/cloud-server
description: MemCode Cloudflare Worker API and static assets

scripts.build: mkdir -p public/css public/js && cp ../../packages/landing/index.html public/ && cp ../../packages/landing/login.html public/ && cp ../../packages/landing/dashboard.html public/ && cp ../../packages/landing/privacy.html public/ && cp ../../packages/landing/public/css/style.css public/css/ && cp ../../packages/landing/public/js/app.js public/js/ && cp ../../packages/landing/public/js/login.js public/js/ && cp ../../packages/landing/public/js/dashboard.js public/js/
scripts.cf:secrets:sync: pnpm run cf:secrets:prepare && wrangler secret bulk .cloudflare-secrets.env
